zh.lifeSummary: 當Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath於1143年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾時，她的父親Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed26歲，母親Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed42歲。她於大約1163年與Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath于1143年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾时，她的父亲Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed26岁，母亲Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed42岁。她于大约1163年与Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Annes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

variants.name: Annice
meanings: Variant spelling of Annis , based on the numerous women's names ending in -ice.

variants.name: Annys
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Coed
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo): variant of Cowan , or an alternative Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cúáin or Ó Cadhain (see Coyne ).
Dutch and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Koen  .

variants.name: Coyne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Colm, John Patrick, Malachy, Marypat.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cadhain ‘descendant of Cadhan’, a byname from cadhan ‘barnacle goose’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Comhgháin ‘descendant of Comghán’, a Connacht name usually Anglicized as Coen .

variants.name: Cowan
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

nameMeanings.name: Rhath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Roth  .
English (Warwickshire): nickname from Middle English wrothe ‘angry, fierce, bold’ (Old English wrāth).

variants.name: Roth
meanings: Biblical name (of uncertain derivation) of a Moabite woman who left her own people to remain with her mother-in-law Naomi, and afterwards became the wife of Boaz and an ancestress of David. Her story is told in the book of the Bible that bears her name. It was used among the Puritans in England in the 16th century, partly because of its association with the English vocabulary word ruth meaning ‘compassion’. It has always been popular as a Jewish name, but is now also widespread among people of many different cultures and creeds.

en.lifeSummary: When Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath was born in 1143, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, was 26 and her mother, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, was 42. She married Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared about 1163, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath est née en 1143, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared environ 1163, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath 1143 in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed 26 und ihre Mutter Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed 42. Sie hat um 1163 in Wales, United Kingdom Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath è nata il nel 1143 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared circa 1163, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhathが1143年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfedは26歳，母Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfedは42歳であった。約1163年にイギリスウェールズでPrince Gwilym Ap Gwrwaredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath(이)가 1143년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1163년 영국 웨일스에서 Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath nasceu em 1143, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared aproximadamente 1163, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath родилась в 1143 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared около 1163 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath nació en 1143, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Seisyll ap Llawrodd of Dyfed, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared aproximadamente 1163, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos.
